name: leyline-marketplace
description: Marketplace self-hosting the Leyline developer-session workflow plugin. Add with `/plugin marketplace add forsonny/leyline` then install with `/plugin install leyline@leyline-marketplace`.

plugins.name: leyline
plugins.description: Opinionated developer-session workflow. Encodes one coherent session from first message to merged branch as a deterministic pipeline of skills that hand off to each other in a fixed order. 21 skills, 2 subagents, session-start hook, iron-law enforcement for TDD / systematic-debugging / verification / design-driven-development / accessibility-verification.
